| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE SUNDAY, DECEMBER 27, 2020 KELLY LOEFFLER RELEASES NEW AD HIGHLIGHTING HER AMERICAN DREAM STORY
ATLANTA - Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler released a new TV ad highlighting her life story and how it shaped her conservative campaign to preserve the American Dream for future generations.
Watch "Braces" by clicking [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gyDA-W6LBJ3qDbHVi_CaojeT--N64C5ZBNTjIsFcHjLbHx0UgP5Fb77QMljC2atNzKDIKiPfFadhT_CYQqqKNEar8Yy_8qzKc1mkMw3LzK3ThcC1qr8lJd7kYhxouyl6uQ3f_djAXol19ZN_ln6_3YmMsDq0SPsqRoitEoVsy3CEAONaoDYpMeklTa4Y8hEdWcE-R6O7s6U=&c=uFGXZEv-XQct1Exw6z-EH4kwa-N0PKIQfml3xFkmezq1JqZGCZZDbw==&ch=oHCV4zPrbksPaKfJlj0ByUBG6h7KuYm6UIqtVmSHYDgV0kcTWM1Meg==) or the photo below.

| View the ad transcript below:
NARRATOR: "A little girl with braces on her legs grew the resilience to never give up.
An eyepatch gave way to a clear conservative vision for the future.
And early mornings on the family farm led to broken glass ceilings in business, and more.
Anything is possible in America, and Kelly Loeffler is running to keep it that way."

subject: The Soul of our Nation is at stake

body:
We need YOU today, %%First Name%%.

Friend,

There is a battle being fought for the soul of our nation. How our country acts now will have lasting effects on the future. Who wins this election will have a generational impact.

[**Will you step up right now to help David Perdue HOLD THE LINE?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ie48Ru1YswR4yYDWkF0S9C3Gg9Ifd54dVm4zcDqy70LLECm1vecoT0USu2wuaySa93aOr63Y1uPOPzwwKzoTRbe6m9qfdJQdUml-SJcEF0XvRnmT4OsJ3DuwRFikok379JVcxyKcVsy_Qt8JWKdb85juu6TVGIDBRj5yEAfcVmav05NmV93xUk5QnZU6cTvGK_i06WduR9mSgMiEVfZ6efFlZJXmiyFQCaOUKlq9BklrHm0uc-MWR3EpeqXWX1w0Fwb5gdw75TIUdsCQCX7xSyZNGWN7XzRbsZO4gLrYhMFr1RgSu3NgxI0R1TDjKHPTdkLp-2VwmnkHsEpQbM2qF3YRmtENCMD6dGlnyjyrBYwLXaZFIroo5c8wA0F1TYT5W5BzSIa65NIoFVLu9SRJjyLL0F6Ujfdwc87GzFjFmpgCz8_mA9MbRA==&c=8jWkVUIK4Sud68wvMb2zE1lvolX6KLZWU8_N6EKv6hEGkrCNg-8lNQ==&ch=WjWmn5AAk924fue1hf76TqXjRjm6JW57fYQGWSP7cihNab_g3MaJ5A==)

The fight for Georgia is one of the most important political battles of our LIFETIME. Senator David Perdue's runoff race will decide if Republicans control the Senate come January.

David is locked in a tough fight with liberal Democrats, and a major end-of-year fundraising deadline is almost here. _**He is currently down by $176,295 and needs your help to cover the difference.**_

[**Can you donate to help Republicans beat our end-of-quarter goal and DEFEAT the Democrats in this runoff?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ie48Ru1YswR4yYDWkF0S9C3Gg9Ifd54dVm4zcDqy70LLECm1vecoT0USu2wuaySayjPACLa15krufi3Y2N0HVR5YiKRPBkB__yhgw5zI7Xw5nqrogP3R3Fncsl4in_FhqZk7Lp26yklpbyHHXDX8JEaOpgX19i8oKFDGYDg9lMxWMlLCCyLO_NbbT8znJW5AwFgeiiC7ICBE45XGpYkyXdY3slI1_0dC4m0GzH5sT05qbnU_OmawudhKc-FNLx4eRpTZeNV9tvTzCwvYJGFijCozuQVn9hvr7-NKCEiXSlhXuhUJIwh5MMHSbXj-uN0LbFUG3toMO7M35j_7OcRWgEsxCg2Gn-ecVQmEIQwL8AGx0BoR6Fhj_KTyQ5FkIT-7uiLmG9AarZyzRK5UIdFIr3jdycaHtzDeX99FqkqJGcs6rvnX90FAPQ==&c=8jWkVUIK4Sud68wvMb2zE1lvolX6KLZWU8_N6EKv6hEGkrCNg-8lNQ==&ch=WjWmn5AAk924fue1hf76TqXjRjm6JW57fYQGWSP7cihNab_g3MaJ5A==)

Friend, letting the Democrats win means saying yes to a radical, socialist agenda and giving the government MORE power.

[**But you can help stop the Democrats by donating right now to help David Perdue win his runoff.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ie48Ru1YswR4yYDWkF0S9C3Gg9Ifd54dVm4zcDqy70LLECm1vecoT0USu2wuaySayjPACLa15krufi3Y2N0HVR5YiKRPBkB__yhgw5zI7Xw5nqrogP3R3Fncsl4in_FhqZk7Lp26yklpbyHHXDX8JEaOpgX19i8oKFDGYDg9lMxWMlLCCyLO_NbbT8znJW5AwFgeiiC7ICBE45XGpYkyXdY3slI1_0dC4m0GzH5sT05qbnU_OmawudhKc-FNLx4eRpTZeNV9tvTzCwvYJGFijCozuQVn9hvr7-NKCEiXSlhXuhUJIwh5MMHSbXj-uN0LbFUG3toMO7M35j_7OcRWgEsxCg2Gn-ecVQmEIQwL8AGx0BoR6Fhj_KTyQ5FkIT-7uiLmG9AarZyzRK5UIdFIr3jdycaHtzDeX99FqkqJGcs6rvnX90FAPQ==&c=8jWkVUIK4Sud68wvMb2zE1lvolX6KLZWU8_N6EKv6hEGkrCNg-8lNQ==&ch=WjWmn5AAk924fue1hf76TqXjRjm6JW57fYQGWSP7cihNab_g3MaJ5A==)

If David can hit his CRITICAL end-of-year goal, we will be well positioned to keep fighting for the rest of the campaign so we can win this runoff. Supporting David is our best chance to hold the conservative Majority in the Senate and stop the Democrats in this fight.

[**Will you help Republicans win this important political battle?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ie48Ru1YswR4yYDWkF0S9C3Gg9Ifd54dVm4zcDqy70LLECm1vecoT0USu2wuaySayjPACLa15krufi3Y2N0HVR5YiKRPBkB__yhgw5zI7Xw5nqrogP3R3Fncsl4in_FhqZk7Lp26yklpbyHHXDX8JEaOpgX19i8oKFDGYDg9lMxWMlLCCyLO_NbbT8znJW5AwFgeiiC7ICBE45XGpYkyXdY3slI1_0dC4m0GzH5sT05qbnU_OmawudhKc-FNLx4eRpTZeNV9tvTzCwvYJGFijCozuQVn9hvr7-NKCEiXSlhXuhUJIwh5MMHSbXj-uN0LbFUG3toMO7M35j_7OcRWgEsxCg2Gn-ecVQmEIQwL8AGx0BoR6Fhj_KTyQ5FkIT-7uiLmG9AarZyzRK5UIdFIr3jdycaHtzDeX99FqkqJGcs6rvnX90FAPQ==&c=8jWkVUIK4Sud68wvMb2zE1lvolX6KLZWU8_N6EKv6hEGkrCNg-8lNQ==&ch=WjWmn5AAk924fue1hf76TqXjRjm6JW57fYQGWSP7cihNab_g3MaJ5A==)

Thank you,

Tim Scott

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. body:
The end of the year is almost here, and we have one last MAJOR goal to accomplish. Can I count on you to help reach our End of Year goal and start 2021 off strong?
Friend,

In the past four years, Republicans delivered [**INCREDIBLE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NxPFCalLwVTCjQjgtSAAz17Y9exWuAU-CBZwifUKdTg_SO55JWCdpauCMDU4uVRMa8d9eoOGvamMsckR1KRcAn7e-QitasIU-t7ptEzU5-4QkkOoNDlG3qw78kFWVOlpFxg5UwA4YNpcP_f2h2yUl09wu6eoeh_fHSEVniwv-e4GqmTVCf7_fx-o__NdSFkEc_C8-z4Eo6e1BqVyyI7yinrWt4XzHQz5vuOwrBaeQbEzajvFBw6BD4tJ2i3VAUO7tasg7kGddOxGb-0dFLK51PO78v8hpvM_yhLDmnJy1xGcRsIW4V0f-ladcFY9Qy9myineO1MBJFej79DoYG_CNqypFB4mW3wQYfXyccccRW80DWTmgMRMn1tg7YdBzUNTEdcGydFtiJwT6-zGJuWIse6goi4iMK89&c=RmYzbXX6I9XzarxZn2Tlp9MPlYhmU_fDkkTUWiY2Vqd0jTOS_Wi1bw==&ch=KNY_j1_k6wpDUGdiF6rzwYhMUY0g0Gc5h9kW6NAR_I_pEMwotSL3uA==) accomplishments for the American people.
* **We** cut taxes and regulations.
* **We** fought tirelessly to increase our nation's security where it was needed most.
* **We** confirmed 3 Supreme Court Justices and now have cemented a conservative majority on our nation's highest court.

_**But now, the end of the year is almost here, and we have one last MAJOR goal to accomplish.**_

[**We 're coming up on our End of Year Fundraising goal and 6X-MATCHING IS UNLOCKED to help us reach the biggest goal of 2020. Senate Republicans are in urgent need of your help!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NxPFCalLwVTCjQjgtSAAz17Y9exWuAU-CBZwifUKdTg_SO55JWCdpauCMDU4uVRMa8d9eoOGvamMsckR1KRcAn7e-QitasIU-t7ptEzU5-4QkkOoNDlG3qw78kFWVOlpFxg5UwA4YNpcP_f2h2yUl09wu6eoeh_fHSEVniwv-e4GqmTVCf7_fx-o__NdSFkEc_C8-z4Eo6e1BqVyyI7yinrWt4XzHQz5vuOwrBaeQbEzajvFBw6BD4tJ2i3VAUO7tasg7kGddOxGb-0dFLK51PO78v8hpvM_yhLDmnJy1xGcRsIW4V0f-ladcFY9Qy9myineO1MBJFej79DoYG_CNqypFB4mW3wQYfXyccccRW80DWTmgMRMn1tg7YdBzUNTEdcGydFtiJwT6-zGJuWIse6goi4iMK89&c=RmYzbXX6I9XzarxZn2Tlp9MPlYhmU_fDkkTUWiY2Vqd0jTOS_Wi1bw==&ch=KNY_j1_k6wpDUGdiF6rzwYhMUY0g0Gc5h9kW6NAR_I_pEMwotSL3uA==)

**[**Can I count on you to help reach our End of Year goal and start 2021 off strong? 6X-MATCH is active until MIDNIGHT:**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NxPFCalLwVTCjQjgtSAAz17Y9exWuAU-CBZwifUKdTg_SO55JWCdpauCMDU4uVRMa8d9eoOGvamMsckR1KRcAn7e-QitasIU-t7ptEzU5-4QkkOoNDlG3qw78kFWVOlpFxg5UwA4YNpcP_f2h2yUl09wu6eoeh_fHSEVniwv-e4GqmTVCf7_fx-o__NdSFkEc_C8-z4Eo6e1BqVyyI7yinrWt4XzHQz5vuOwrBaeQbEzajvFBw6BD4tJ2i3VAUO7tasg7kGddOxGb-0dFLK51PO78v8hpvM_yhLDmnJy1xGcRsIW4V0f-ladcFY9Qy9myineO1MBJFej79DoYG_CNqypFB4mW3wQYfXyccccRW80DWTmgMRMn1tg7YdBzUNTEdcGydFtiJwT6-zGJuWIse6goi4iMK89&c=RmYzbXX6I9XzarxZn2Tlp9MPlYhmU_fDkkTUWiY2Vqd0jTOS_Wi1bw==&ch=KNY_j1_k6wpDUGdiF6rzwYhMUY0g0Gc5h9kW6NAR_I_pEMwotSL3uA==)**
**[**6X DONATE $5OO=$35OO**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/mcconnell-5x-matching-nrsc?sc=pem2800m11m&utm_campaign=20201227_TY.100609_mitch-mcconnell_t1044605-575&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201227_the-end.&amount=500)**

Once again, your support _**BEFORE**_ the End of Year deadline is what will decide our next victories in Georgia on [January 5th](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NxPFCalLwVTCjQjgtSAAz17Y9exWuAU-CBZwifUKdTg_SO55JWCdpauCMDU4uVRMa8d9eoOGvamMsckR1KRcAn7e-QitasIU-t7ptEzU5-4QkkOoNDlG3qw78kFWVOlpFxg5UwA4YNpcP_f2h2yUl09wu6eoeh_fHSEVniwv-e4GqmTVCf7_fx-o__NdSFkEc_C8-z4Eo6e1BqVyyI7yinrWt4XzHQz5vuOwrBaeQbEzajvFBw6BD4tJ2i3VAUO7tasg7kGddOxGb-0dFLK51PO78v8hpvM_yhLDmnJy1xGcRsIW4V0f-ladcFY9Qy9myineO1MBJFej79DoYG_CNqypFB4mW3wQYfXyccccRW80DWTmgMRMn1tg7YdBzUNTEdcGydFtiJwT6-zGJuWIse6goi4iMK89&c=RmYzbXX6I9XzarxZn2Tlp9MPlYhmU_fDkkTUWiY2Vqd0jTOS_Wi1bw==&ch=KNY_j1_k6wpDUGdiF6rzwYhMUY0g0Gc5h9kW6NAR_I_pEMwotSL3uA==).

subject: I’m terrified of the Democrat Agenda

body:
It will destroy our nation.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mGK40op2ji1psEydWfm9lu5nxlcs-7uvXXEkFr7pg99uwKKRtMOd39jE2mvIkRgFadJH4atZ3WO6-bdfoqMhIwTtNVwmwnhnZxpHjzTzYV0ah3y5RAa7SN5DZOJl1i_uoNgjjkUydgw4VzEYzh3VK1TbsdaSvoQUKbz1mPLiDlvtCSaCIxqnA6h7bIIdWdfbC13OCxmBtpV1qvxdMeONBgkXjNSqf23c0ALSQHS_puKzlZgsYZbO1ISoECp4SOFYJYdmGDyGPd1G23jZh1mSTO51-W05fwR2n8PJAlTC8xH0BVlhQiqyNuyXWRlnAPD_DVlW-WHlLBg72pvsq9fHV9QcVtCmki7DyN535Bw35JFgO9Wvwhn7TGydSFwAE-tGZR2J09ukRdVWmXH_HtAJwjhBfPFj_Oe8cLhjkOMLgT_zZjyI0lWrJHFfCobS9vfm5bX1hUsSpG8=&c=MsAy1_V2U8NxO4JYDuhD7OsiAVyqc8Y_QfOG1AB6gCAs8Opfu289LQ==&ch=2neN_gQwZQYKgHsK1xmzT9Q8rkwL0U5gfx74p2FpoMGxV5oj2BqDRA==)
This is former Senior Advisor to President Trump, and Congressman-Elect for the #1 most pro-Trump district in America, Dr. Ronny Jackson. I'm going to be honest with you: **I 'm terrified of the idea of anti-Americans like Ilhan Omar, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Nancy Pelosi being able to impose their will on this nation, and on our families. ** When I get into Congress, I'm going to FIGHT every single day to stop this from happening, but to do that I need your help. _**Nancy Pelosi is going to remain House Speaker, and with that, her party will have the advantage against patriots like you and me. name: Roger Misso
subject: Show Jon Ossoff & Raphael Warnock that we have their backs!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Here at Taking the Hill, we support veterans and military family members running for Congress - good candidates with integrity who are in tough races. That's why we are proud to be [ALL-IN for both Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock](https://act.myngp.com/el/zxLFnlQoipUYFA4DM-1DygV4JeqCiR2VOgR55F6dy1Q=/JTgQeY2TKOOhjc8OuFLEBGwsuT-xDcqyviPRhpK-A2I=) for U.S. Senate in Georgia!

Veterans know Jon Ossoff. As a documentary filmmaker, Jon has served alongside us in conflict zones to hold authoritarians and human rights abusers accountable. We would trust Jon with our life.

Raphael Warnock comes from a military family. His father's service in World War II shaped Raphael's life. Jonathan Warnock joined the Army and fought for his country in the hopes that he could better his life and his family's station. He came home to a country that, despite his Army uniform, still relegated him to the "colored" section of buses and public places. His son, Raphael, has never stopped fighting for an America that cares for all of our veterans - and all people - regardless of the color of their skin.

I don't need to tell you the stakes of this election: two Republican Senators that abused their office to make a disgusting profit in the stock market. The balance of a Senate that just denied COVID relief and unemployment benefits for millions of Americans. The tenure of Majority Leader Mitch McConnell who has already stated that he will destroy any legislation that the Biden administration puts forward to reverse the devastation of the last four years of Trump.

That's why we need **_you._** We want to make sure Jon and Raphael have what they need to win, and I know you do as well. [_**For the next 24 hours, whoever donates at this link will have their donation matched 100% by**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/zxLFnlQoipUYFA4DM-1DygV4JeqCiR2VOgR55F6dy1Q=/JTgQeY2TKOOhjc8OuFLEBGwsuT-xDcqyviPRhpK-A2I=)[ _** Taking The Hill up to a total matched amount of $5000! Will you help us give Jon & Raphael a major boost by chipping in today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/zxLFnlQoipUYFA4DM-1DygV4JeqCiR2VOgR55F6dy1Q=/JTgQeY2TKOOhjc8OuFLEBGwsuT-xDcqyviPRhpK-A2I=)

Thank you for your support. Veterans helped win Georgia once - we can do it twice more on January 5th!

In solidarity,
Roger

_Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/zxLFnlQoipUYFA4DM-1DygV4JeqCiR2VOgR55F6dy1Q=/npUK4mPYHIN906WT2MAnk59aqoXxddX3SEjbKOE09q8=)_
[_@RogerMissoCNY_](https://act.myngp.com/el/zxLFnlQoipUYFA4DM-1DygV4JeqCiR2VOgR55F6dy1Q=/LkCyn8HoEycUl4Aho4oDa7H_E3RD-KRuW8Gh_QLfMlY=)

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
---
Taking The Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States

name: Mike Huckabee
subject: Remember this name.
body:
Peter,
I want you to remember this name, and I’ll tell you why it matters: Xavier Becerra.
Joe Biden recently announced Becerra, the current Attorney General of California, as his pick for Secretary of Health and Human Services.
As California’s top law enforcement official, this is the man who sued the Little Sisters of the Poor after the U.S. Supreme Court decided in their favor and sought felony convictions against the pro-life filmmakers who exposed the Planned Parenthood fetal body part scandal.
**If you think such a pro-abortion radical in a position of great power is a direct threat to biblical values, then the election next week in Georgia is our first major opportunity to speak up.******
So, I’m going to be as direct as possible – My Faith Votes needs your immediate help raising the resources necessary to mobilize Christian voters.
**Our drop-dead date for mailing our volunteer postcards to 1 million targeted voters is December 30, and we’re still shy of our $200,000 goal to make this happen. I know this is ambitious, but every gift unlocks a portion of a generous $100,000 matching grant. This means every dollar you give will be doubled in size.******
[**We can’t miss this window, and I hope you’ll help with an emergency donation right now.**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201227apl01nd&n=1 "Donate Now!")****
Before the November 3 election, we told you how clearly the battle lines were drawn. Now, we’re seeing it play out. We must act right now.
On January 5, we have the opportunity to make a statement. Let’s make sure it happens.
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201227apl01nd&n=2)
Thank you for your faithful commitment.
Sincerely,
Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201227apl01nd&n=3)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201227apl01nd&n=4).

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: SENATORS LOEFFLER, PERDUE ISSUE JOINT STATEMENT ON COVID-19 RELIEF PACKAGE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE SUNDAY, DECEMBER 27, 2020 SENATORS LOEFFLER, PERDUE ISSUE JOINT STATEMENT ON COVID-19 RELIEF PACKAGE
ATLANTA - Tonight, Senators Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue issued the following joint statement after President Trump signed into law the COVlD-19 relief bill:
"Thanks to President Trump's leadership, COVID relief is again on its way to the millions of Georgia families and businesses who need it most. This package will deliver nearly $1 trillion in additional aid on top of the trillions in relief already disbursed. Over $47 billion has already gone directly to Georgia's families, farmers, front-line workers, schools, hospitals, and more help is on the way.
"Make no mistake: a great deal of work remains. The coronavirus pandemic grinded to a halt the greatest economic turnaround in American history, and Democrats are hellbent on a socialist agenda that prioritizes wasteful, irresponsible spending over the wellbeing of the American people. We look forward to continuing to fight alongside the president in his relentless pursuit to keep America great."
---
| ###
Stephen Lawson Deputy Campaign Manager [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015UCuljvFqdWcipHDP93--3yzd60oMQNdjHnRhU_elcrtpuLo6a_K8VxQ2a-UjN-Dhm-Uxadb5ys7Cu8lGTeIoHw-jXy_ua0YrpN0QbyunCEkdkoD2mhxV47eBitSEpsriSPw4iH8iTA51hpHsGGt4cCOaINstpie&c=iWJgLNyILMT2W770xPdYq7jQxnkyy6FrBqKZKZs3TDoDIOMb1iZVKw==&ch=lgumu6nlkxVq3DxkGh_ECNBF-4CV6ZiwB8wtqqyMqU9Mj6vhB_oiOQ==)

body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ePRTjlrLIryv_amYPPE368BYnj7b4d8XpYmUJjK6MPMwaAhFNao_Qq2ZJxMjIXWMy9ltBABmLXfkU6jE_bfW18GqSXLZ_QW4yr_mDW_Dy_6TKrbvr3QvQiZTHeR3StY3ElTP5KBoqL43fFkwq88vXb3MbcOPUTbWAYMqBKVxcniioeLwF5TIiQ==&c=QHQ2mB291xokjxBqkI3nHwnByXEg51jFZd6lTOOjJ-BZOq3aUadffw==&ch=iebpUSVo1cHXyG8A2kxaZ1CRDlqppuxB_0kbIjWofIpG_R7xHZBFxA==)

| Peter,
Chinese spies are targeting our elected officials, and Democrats have become the main target. It's not much of a surprise, seeing how weak they are on China.
